column1: Luis Arraez leads the charge today with a steady bat and a prime leadoff spot, boasting a sky-high 72.7% hit probability and the platoon advantage against Chris Bassitt. Yandy Diaz isn’t far behind, anchoring the top of Tampa Bay’s order at home with a strong matchup and a favorable park to boost his reliable profile. Xavier Edwards and Trea Turner both offer solid top-of-order opportunities, but Arraez and Diaz stand out for Beat The Streak players looking for that next hit.
